# Recommendation Pack: Track Record

Recommendation pack shows outstanding performance of 1.7~2.6 times that of competing models even when using commercial service data

## Comparison with Beauty Commerce Recommendation Models

Recommendation model Hit Ratio comparison

| Model | Hit Ratio |
| --- | --- |
| Graph-RecSys | 0.4048 |
| Attn-RecSys | 0.3278 |
| Personalize | 0.23496 |
| Current Service Recommendation Algorithm | 0.159 |

*Note:*
- Personalize: 1.7X increase
- Current Service Recommendation Algorithm: 2.6X increase
